name: Crescent Italiano
recipeIngredient: 16 oz reduced fat crescent dinner rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9 inches pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add chicken, onions, bell peppers, and garlic. Cook until no pink remains in the chicken and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir tomato paste, crushed tomatoes, salt, basil, oregano, and black pepper. Simmer.
5. Pour mixture into prepared pan. Top with cheeses.
6. In a small bowl, combine sour cream and Italian seasoning.
7. Roll each triangle flat, slightly enlarging them. Spread one teaspoon of the sour cream mixture in each triangle.
8. Roll up as directed on the package. Place rolls on top of the cheese.
9. Bake for 30 minutes.
